observation: Integration review 2026-04-09: Phase 1 complete and working (adaptive/router → ollama_cloud/glm-5.1 live, 36 models accessible). Test suite passes. BUT: residual glm-5.1:cloud references in tools/ollama-ipc.py, tools/ollama-cloud-test.sh, youi-web/ollama-bridge.mjs, youi-web/server.mjs. tools/ollama-cloud-test.sh uses BROKEN api.ollama.com endpoint. Phase 2 (heartbeat migration) NOT done — heartbeat-runner.sh still branches ollama-local/Claude. Phase 3 (fleet) NOT done — fleet-agent-deploy.sh still pulls local qwen2.5:7b. kingdom-agent.py has no ollama_cloud backend. Latency observations: trivial prompts take 15-45s because reasoning field eats tokens (confirmed by bench: 20 tok/s avg).

Phase 2 heartbeat migration complete. Commit b1a521d. 8 files changed, 346 insertions, 62 deletions. All E2E tests pass. Coordinator backend selection is staged: rest-mode beats with pending work (melatonin>0.5, pending>0) now use glm-5.1 via ollama_cloud, active/alert beats stay on Claude until parity data gathered. Spawn template exposes 5 cloud variants (builder/coder/consultant/analyst/quick). Automatic fallback to claude-haiku if cloud unreachable. Deferred: /Users/yuai/Love sync, Phase 3 (fleet), Phase 4 (continuous builders).
